<!--
  Release-notes template — stamped onto each GitHub release by the publish workflow.

  Placeholders (all required, replaced verbatim by the workflow):
    {{VERSION}} — the release version, e.g. 1.0.0 or 1.1.0-rc.2
    {{CHANNEL}} — the Velopack channel: `stable` (final releases) or `beta` (pre-releases / RCs)
    {{DATE}}    — the publish date in YYYY-MM-DD

  Everything below this comment (after the blank line) is the release body.
-->

**Sennett for macOS — {{VERSION}}** · Channel: `{{CHANNEL}}` · {{DATE}}

Sennett is a meeting-reminder app that makes sure you never miss a meeting. Download the `.dmg` below, open it, and drag **Sennett** into your Applications folder — the app keeps itself up to date automatically. Releases on the `beta` channel are pre-releases for testers and may contain bugs.

- Website: [sennett.app](https://sennett.app)
- Latest stable version: [releases/latest](https://github.com/lumebuild/sennett_releases/releases/latest)

---

**Sennett para macOS — {{VERSION}}** · Canal: `{{CHANNEL}}` · {{DATE}}

O Sennett é um aplicativo de lembretes de reunião que garante que você nunca perca uma reunião. Baixe o `.dmg` abaixo, abra-o e arraste o **Sennett** para a pasta Aplicativos — o aplicativo se mantém atualizado automaticamente. Lançamentos no canal `beta` são pré-lançamentos para testadores e podem conter bugs.

- Site: [sennett.com.br](https://sennett.com.br)
- Última versão estável: [releases/latest](https://github.com/lumebuild/sennett_releases/releases/latest)
